languages.text: {n}Глаза мужчины наполняются подобием решимости, пока его лицо корчится в спазмах.{/n} "Г-герой... пр-р-ример... подражания. Г-герой... превозмогает. Где шлем, со-о-олдат?" {n}Кулак вновь впечатывается в стальную грудь.{/n} "Бог-Император, я не убоюсь! Император... убоюсь..."

{n}Something akin to resolve appears in the man's eyes as his face is seized by spasms.{/n} "A h-hero... is to b-be... emulated. A h-hero... overcomes. Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."

Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."

languages.text: {n}男の目はクリアになり、狂信的な決意に満ちた。{/n}「英雄...? 英雄は模範にすべきだ。英雄は弱さを見せない、彼は勝利する。」{n}彼は鉄の胸に拳を突き刺す。{/n}「命令は明らかだ！痛みを拒否し、この新しい身体をマスターし、王朝と天皇のために生きろ！」
languages.original_text: {n}The man's eyes clear, then fill with fanatical resolve.{/n} "A hero...? A hero is to be emulated. A hero does not show weakness, he prevails." {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "The orrrder is clear! Reject pain, master this new body, and live for the dynasty and the Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: 男の目はクリアになり、狂信的な決意に満ちた。{n}「英雄...? 英雄は模範にすべきだ。英雄は弱さを見せない、彼は勝利する。」{n}彼は鉄の胸に拳を突き刺す。{n}「命令は明らかだ！痛みを拒否し、この新しい身体をマスターし、王朝と天皇のために生きろ！」

languages.text: {n}那个男人的眼中浮现出一种类似决心的东西，但他的面容仍被抽搐支配。{/n}“英——英雄……是榜样。英——英雄……能克服一切。你的头盔呢，士——兵？”{n}他又一拳砸在自己的钢铁胸膛上。{/n}“神皇啊，我无所畏惧！帝皇啊……我……畏惧……”
languages.original_text: {n}Something akin to resolve appears in the man's eyes as his face is seized by spasms.{/n} "A h-hero... is to b-be... emulated. A h-hero... overcomes. Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."

traits.locale_text: {n}那个男人的眼中浮现出一种类似决心的东西，但他的面容仍被抽搐支配。{/n}“英——英雄……是榜样。英——英雄……能克服一切。你的头盔呢，士——兵？”{n}他又一拳砸在自己的钢铁胸膛上。{/n}“神皇啊，我无所畏惧！帝皇啊……我……畏惧……”

languages.text: {n}Une lueur semblable à de la détermination s'allume dans les yeux de l'homme, tandis que son visage se déforme dans une succession de spasmes.{/n} « Un-un héros est un e-exemple à suivre. Un héros... l'emporte toujours. Où est votre casque, soooldat ? » {n}Il se frappe à nouveau la poitrine de son poing.{/n} « Par l'Empereur-Dieu, je n'aurai pas peur ! Empereur... J'aurai... peur... »
languages.original_text: {n}Something akin to resolve appears in the man's eyes as his face is seized by spasms.{/n} "A h-hero... is to b-be... emulated. A h-hero... overcomes. Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."

Un héros... l'emporte toujours. Où est votre casque, soooldat ? » {n}Il se frappe à nouveau la poitrine de son poing.{/n} « Par l'Empereur-Dieu, je n'aurai pas peur ! Empereur... J'aurai... peur... »

languages.text: {n}Algo que podría pasar por firmeza aparece en los ojos del hombre entre convulsiones.{/n} «Un hé... héroe es... un ejemplo... a imitar. Un hé... héroe... supera. ¿Dónde está tu casco, soldadooo?». {n}Aporrea su pecho metálico con el puño.{/n} «¡Dios Emperador, no temeré! Dios Emperador... sí... tengo miedo...».
languages.original_text: {n}Something akin to resolve appears in the man's eyes as his face is seized by spasms.{/n} "A h-hero... is to b-be... emulated. A h-hero... overcomes. Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."

Un hé... héroe... supera. ¿Dónde está tu casco, soldadooo?». {n}Aporrea su pecho metálico con el puño.{/n} «¡Dios Emperador, no temeré! Dios Emperador... sí... tengo miedo...».

languages.text: {n}Yüzü spazmlarla kasılırken adamın gözlerinde kararlılığa benzer bir şey beliriyor.{/n} "Bir ka... Kahraman... Ör... Örnek... Alınmalıdır. Bir ka... Kahraman... Üstesinden gelir. Kaskın nerede, aaaasker?" {n}Yumruğunu tekrar çelik göğsüne indiriyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator, korkmayacağım! İmparator... Korkacağım..."
languages.original_text: {n}Something akin to resolve appears in the man's eyes as his face is seized by spasms.{/n} "A h-hero... is to b-be... emulated. A h-hero... overcomes. Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."

Üstesinden gelir. Kaskın nerede, aaaasker?" {n}Yumruğunu tekrar çelik göğsüne indiriyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator, korkmayacağım! İmparator... Korkacağım..."

languages.text: {n}Ein Hauch von Erlösung erscheint in den Augen des Mannes, während sein Gesicht unter Krämpfen zuckt.{/n} "Einem H-helden ... g-gilt es ... nachzueifern. Ein H-held ... setzt sich durch. Wo ist Euer Helm, Soooldat?" {n}Er schlägt sich erneut mir der Faust gegen die stählerne Brust.{/n} "Gottimperator, ich werde keine Angst haben! Imperator ... Ich werde ... Angst haben ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Something akin to resolve appears in the man's eyes as his face is seized by spasms.{/n} "A h-hero... is to b-be... emulated. A h-hero... overcomes. Where's your helmet, soooldier?" {n}He hammers his fist again into his steel chest.{/n} "God-Emperor, I will not be afraid! Emperor... I will... be afraid..."
